MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-01-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Set For Trial On Aug-14-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-14-2016 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID COOK OF THE COOK COLLECTION ATTORNEYS, TEL. NO. 1-415-989-4730 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROBERT H. STALEY OF THE EPSTEIN, ENGLERT, STALEY & COFFEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-398-6392 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Enterprise Rent-A-Car of San Francisco's application for a right to attach order is denied. The claim asserted by Enterprise is not of the type that the attachment procedure was designed to reach. The damages sought by Enterprise for the asserted property damage of the rented vehicles are neither fixed nor readily ascertainable by reference to the parties' contract. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR # 6576 =302/hk

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Continued To Aug-30-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
